steps.title: Find the key signal about Cole's investment in his passions
steps.content:
The passage describes how Cole's book evocatively combines his original photographs with his poetic prose.

The word evocatively—stirring emotion and creating vivid impressions—signals deep, passionate engagement with both forms.

This tells us what Cole's attitude toward his two passions must be.

steps.title: Match the signal to the best choice
steps.content:
The words passions, culminates, and evocatively combines all point to Cole's excitement about photography and writing. Enthusiasm for matches that positive, invested attitude.

Indifference to would mean a lack of interest, concern about would suggest worry, and surprise at would suggest unexpectedness; none of those fit the context.
